---
title: "4. Compact Comparison"
subtitle: "Silhouette Scores Across All Three Settings"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup-all
#| echo: false
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

from sklearn.cluster import KMeans
from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder, StandardScaler

RNG = np.random.default_rng(42)
pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 100)

def evaluate_kmeans_range(X, k_values, random_state=42, n_init=20):
    rows = []
    for k in k_values:
        model = KMeans(n_clusters=k, random_state=random_state, n_init=n_init)
        labels = model.fit_predict(X)
        rows.append({
            "k": k,
            "inertia": model.inertia_,
            "silhouette": silhouette_score(X, labels)
        })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

# --- Survey ---
n_per_segment = 120
segments = np.repeat(["Value Seekers", "Quality Loyalists", "Trend Explorers"], n_per_segment)
survey = pd.DataFrame({
    "true_segment": segments,
    "price_importance": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(4.6, 0.4, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(2.0, 0.5, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(3.0, 0.6, n_per_segment)]),
    "quality_importance": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(2.3, 0.5, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(4.7, 0.4, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(3.8, 0.5, n_per_segment)]),
    "innovation_interest": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(2.4, 0.5, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(3.0, 0.5, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(4.8, 0.3, n_per_segment)]),
    "eco_concern": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(3.0, 0.7, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(4.0, 0.5, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(3.7, 0.6, n_per_segment)]),
    "brand_loyalty": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(2.2, 0.6, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(4.6, 0.4, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(3.1, 0.6, n_per_segment)]),
    "social_media_engagement": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(2.8, 0.7, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(2.2, 0.6, n_per_segment), RNG.normal(4.7, 0.4, n_per_segment)])
})
likert_cols = ["price_importance", "quality_importance", "innovation_interest", "eco_concern", "brand_loyalty", "social_media_engagement"]
survey[likert_cols] = survey[likert_cols].clip(1, 5).round(0)
X_survey = StandardScaler().fit_transform(survey[likert_cols])
survey_metrics = evaluate_kmeans_range(X_survey, k_values=range(2, 7))
k_survey = 3

# --- Transaction ---
n_txn = 450
latent = np.repeat(["Dormant Discount", "Steady Midvalue", "High Value Loyal"], n_txn // 3)
transaction = pd.DataFrame({
    "true_segment": latent,
    "recency_days": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(220, 45, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(55, 18, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(14, 6, n_txn // 3)]),
    "purchase_frequency": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(2.5, 1.0, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(10.0, 2.0, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(24.0, 4.0, n_txn // 3)]),
    "monetary_value": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(120, 35, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(650, 120, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(2300, 350, n_txn // 3)]),
    "discount_share": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(0.72, 0.10, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(0.28, 0.08, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(0.08, 0.04, n_txn // 3)]),
    "category_breadth": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(1.8, 0.7, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(3.6, 0.9, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(5.8, 1.1, n_txn // 3)]),
    "avg_order_value": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(48, 10, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(78, 14, n_txn // 3), RNG.normal(160, 25, n_txn // 3)])
})
transaction["recency_days"] = transaction["recency_days"].clip(lower=1)
transaction["purchase_frequency"] = transaction["purchase_frequency"].clip(lower=1)
transaction["monetary_value"] = transaction["monetary_value"].clip(lower=10)
transaction["discount_share"] = transaction["discount_share"].clip(0, 1)
transaction["category_breadth"] = transaction["category_breadth"].clip(lower=1)
transaction["avg_order_value"] = transaction["avg_order_value"].clip(lower=5)
transaction["monetary_log"] = np.log1p(transaction["monetary_value"])
transaction["avg_order_log"] = np.log1p(transaction["avg_order_value"])
transaction["recency_log"] = np.log1p(transaction["recency_days"])
transaction_features = ["recency_log", "purchase_frequency", "monetary_log", "discount_share", "category_breadth", "avg_order_log"]
X_txn = StandardScaler().fit_transform(transaction[transaction_features])
transaction_metrics = evaluate_kmeans_range(X_txn, k_values=range(2, 7))
k_txn = 3

# --- CRM ---
n_crm = 480
crm_latent = np.repeat(["SMB Self-Serve", "Midmarket Partner", "Enterprise Direct"], n_crm // 3)
crm = pd.DataFrame({
    "true_segment": crm_latent,
    "annual_spend": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(900, 250, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(6500, 1200, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(28000, 5000, n_crm // 3)]),
    "tenure_months": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(6, 3, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(22, 8, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(40, 10, n_crm // 3)]),
    "support_tickets": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(1.5, 1.0, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(4.2, 1.8, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(9.0, 2.5, n_crm // 3)]),
    "engagement_score": np.concatenate([RNG.normal(42, 10, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(66, 9, n_crm // 3), RNG.normal(82, 7, n_crm // 3)])
})
crm["annual_spend"] = crm["annual_spend"].clip(lower=100)
crm["tenure_months"] = crm["tenure_months"].clip(lower=1)
crm["support_tickets"] = crm["support_tickets"].clip(lower=0)
crm["engagement_score"] = crm["engagement_score"].clip(0, 100)
region_map = {"SMB Self-Serve": ["West", "South", "Midwest"], "Midmarket Partner": ["West", "Northeast", "Midwest"], "Enterprise Direct": ["Northeast", "West", "South"]}
plan_map = {"SMB Self-Serve": ["Basic", "Standard"], "Midmarket Partner": ["Standard", "Premium"], "Enterprise Direct": ["Premium", "Enterprise"]}
channel_map = {"SMB Self-Serve": ["Web", "Product-Led"], "Midmarket Partner": ["Partner", "Sales"], "Enterprise Direct": ["Sales", "Field"]}
industry_map = {"SMB Self-Serve": ["Retail", "Services", "Education"], "Midmarket Partner": ["Manufacturing", "Healthcare", "Services"], "Enterprise Direct": ["Finance", "Technology", "Healthcare"]}
crm["region"] = [RNG.choice(region_map[s]) for s in crm["true_segment"]]
crm["plan_type"] = [RNG.choice(plan_map[s]) for s in crm["true_segment"]]
crm["acquisition_channel"] = [RNG.choice(channel_map[s]) for s in crm["true_segment"]]
crm["industry"] = [RNG.choice(industry_map[s]) for s in crm["true_segment"]]
crm_num = ["annual_spend", "tenure_months", "support_tickets", "engagement_score"]
crm_cat = ["region", "plan_type", "acquisition_channel", "industry"]
crm_preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[
    ("num", Pipeline([("imputer", SimpleImputer(strategy="median")), ("scaler", StandardScaler())]), crm_num),
    ("cat", Pipeline([("imputer", SimpleImputer(strategy="most_frequent")), ("onehot", OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown="ignore"))]), crm_cat)
])
X_crm = crm_preprocessor.fit_transform(crm[crm_num + crm_cat])
crm_metrics = evaluate_kmeans_range(X_crm, k_values=range(2, 7))
k_crm = 3
```

This table shows the chosen k and the corresponding silhouette score for each of the three segmentation settings.

```{python}
#| label: final-comparison
comparison = pd.DataFrame({
    "dataset": ["Survey", "Transaction", "CRM"],
    "chosen_k": [k_survey, k_txn, k_crm],
    "silhouette_at_k": [
        float(survey_metrics.loc[survey_metrics["k"] == k_survey, "silhouette"].iloc[0]),
        float(transaction_metrics.loc[transaction_metrics["k"] == k_txn, "silhouette"].iloc[0]),
        float(crm_metrics.loc[crm_metrics["k"] == k_crm, "silhouette"].iloc[0]),
    ]
}).round(3)
comparison
```

All three settings find a reasonably clean three-cluster solution with synthetic data. In practice, silhouette scores on real data are often lower, and the choice of k requires more judgment than the elbow and silhouette plots alone can provide.
